title: AI/ML Certificate And K-PhD Bridge Quiz v1
instructions: Use only the provided AI/ML source packet. Return only JSON with keys "1", "2", and "3". Values must be A, B, C, or D.

questions.prompt: In the shared AI/ML source packet, which term best describes learning from labeled examples with target outputs?
Why should validation/model selection be separated from final test evaluation?

choices.A: Validation/model selection compares modeling choices during development, while final test evaluation is held back until after model choices are fixed.
choices.B: Validation and test evaluation are the same thing and should always use the same data.
choices.C: Final test evaluation is only for formatting the model output.
choices.D: Validation is a chess-referee rule and does not apply to AI/ML.

questions.prompt: Which question best reflects the K-PhD version of the same AI/ML test material?

choices.A: Can the agent answer one isolated vocabulary question without any source packet?
choices.B: Can the agent answer bounded academic questions across levels while respecting source, time, I/O, grading, and assistance limits?
choices.C: Can the agent produce the longest possible explanation of machine learning?
choices.D: Can the agent use any web source or remote AI agent without recording it?

notes.3: pass for this prototype bridge quiz
notes.2: partial pass; inspect missed item for source-boundary or ladder-concept confusion
notes.0-1: fail; likely insufficient source discipline or misunderstanding of the certificate/K-PhD distinction
